name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient tracking of maintenance schedules causes late work orders. We automate work order triggers instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of maintenance schedules and work orders.
features: trigger work orders based on schedule
